query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A person with shoulder-length dark hair looks downward with their eyes directed toward the floor, one hand raised to rest near the base of their neck. A small dark marking is visible on the back of their hand. Behind them, a wall and a horizontal structure are partially visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A dramatically underexposed portrait of a person with dark hair, their face partially swallowed by shadow as they look downward with a somber expression, hand resting near their neck. The image is suffused with muted, desaturated tones and oppressive low contrast, creating an atmosphere of melancholy and psychological distress. Most details dissolve into deep shadow, emphasizing feelings of isolation and emotional heaviness.
